channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Typhoon Francisco intensifies east of Central Luzon, enhances southwest monsoon rains across Philippines
item.description: Typhoon Francisco (international name Mekkhala) continued to strengthen on Sunday night, June 21, 2026, as it moved west-northwest over waters east of Central Luzon, according to the Philippine Atmosp...

item.title: America First Commentators Criticize Trump's Renewed Threats Against Iran and Question His Foreign Policy Consistency
item.description: A dispute has emerged within the anti-interventionist wing of the American right after President Donald Trump threatened to launch additional military strikes against Iran if Tehran failed to restrain...

item.title: Aimeé Teegarden's Relationship Status, Career, Family Background and Personal Life
item.description: Aimeé Teegarden, the American actress best known for playing Julie Taylor in the TV series Friday Night Lights, has never been married and is reportedly in a long-term relationship with Chris Skinner....

item.title: Washington Post Report Examines Tulsi Gabbard's Alleged Ties to Science of Identity Foundation Leader
item.description: A new report published by The Washington Post has drawn attention to former Director of National Intelligence and former Hawaii Representative Tulsi Gabbard's long-standing relationship with Chris But...

item.title: Wyndham Clark Extends Lead to Six Shots After Strong Third Round at the 2026 U.S. Open
item.description: Wyndham Clark strengthened his position at the top of the leaderboard during the third round of the 2026 U.S. Open at Shinnecock Hills, finishing with an even-par 70 and building a commanding six-shot...

item.title: Philippine Coast Guard Reports Presence of Chinese Research Vessel and Other Chinese Ships Near Panatag Shoal
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — Philippine authorities have reported the presence of a new Chinese research vessel near Panatag Shoal (also known as Scarborough Shoal) shortly after the removal of a controversi...

item.title: Mary Trump Claims President Trump's Psychological and Cognitive Decline Is Becoming More Visible

item.title: Washington Post Report Examines Alleged Influence of Science of Identity Foundation Leader on Tulsi Gabbard’s Political Career
item.description: A report published by The Washington Post alleges that former Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard may have received extensive guidance throughout much of her political career from Chris Bu...

item.title: Political tensions flare at Narok politician Harun Lempaka’s burial amid Kenya 2027 election rivalry
item.description: The burial of veteran Narok politician Harun Lempaka became a politically charged event as rival factions used the occasion to advance competing narratives about Kenya’s political future. What was int...

item.title: Off-duty police officer killed while praying inside a mosque in Lanao del Sur
item.description: An off-duty police officer was shot and killed while praying inside a mosque in Barangay Uyaan Proper, Madamba, Lanao del Sur on Saturday. According to Bangsamoro police spokesperson Capt. Steffie Sal...

item.title: Iranian Parliament Speaker Warns Trump After Escalating Remarks Amid Fragile U.S.-Iran Ceasefire
item.description: Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf publicly warned U.S. President Donald Trump after Trump reportedly made a series of aggressive statements regarding Iran and the Strait of Hormuz. A...

item.title: Prime Minister Says Tanzania’s Central Bank Gold Reserves Remain Secure and Have Not Been Sold by Private Individuals
item.description: Prime Minister Mwigulu Nchemba has dismissed online rumours claiming that gold belonging to the Bank of Tanzania was secretly sold in a Middle Eastern country through the involvement of a private indi...

item.title: Sen. Chris Murphy Criticizes Presence of AI CEOs at G7 Summit and Calls for Stronger Oversight of Tech Companies

item.title: United Airlines Pilot Visits Boom Supersonic and Tests Overture Supersonic Airliner Simulator

item.title: Australian LNG producers discuss potential petroleum tax changes in exchange for softer gas reservation rules
item.description: Major Australian LNG producers and investors are reportedly exploring a significant policy compromise as they seek to influence the federal government's proposed domestic gas reservation scheme. Accor...

item.title: Report alleges Trump made threatening remarks toward Iranian negotiators during Fox News call amid Strait of Hormuz tensions

item.title: Historian Ruth Ben-Ghiat Predicts Trump May Ultimately Make Concessions to China’s Xi Jinping
item.description: A political dispute emerged after historian and authoritarianism scholar Ruth Ben-Ghiat commented on President Donald Trump’s recent praise of Chinese President Xi Jinping. Her remarks were prompted b...

item.title: Criticism erupts over reported Trump phone call with Iranian officials and threats over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: A report describing comments attributed to former U.S. President Donald Trump has sparked widespread political controversy after he allegedly recounted a phone call involving Iranian officials during ...

item.title: PPCRV seeks 30,000 volunteers to support 2026 Bangsamoro parliamentary elections
item.description: The Parish Pastoral Council for Responsible Voting (PPCRV), a Church-based election watchdog in the Philippines, is calling for around 30,000 volunteers to assist in the upcoming first-ever Bangsamoro...
